description_long: This is a modern, asymmetrical wooden shelving unit with a light natural finish. The structure features six open rectangular compartments, each offset horizontally to create a staggered, geometric appearance. The vertical side panel on the left provides stability, while the right side is open, emphasizing the floating effect of the shelves. The shelves are thick and robust, with no visible hardware, doors, or handles, giving the piece a minimalist and contemporary look. The back and sides are solid, while the front and shelf interiors are open for easy access and display. This type of shelving is suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public waiting areas, where it can be used to store or display books, decor, or informational materials.
description: A modern, asymmetrical wooden shelving unit with six open, staggered compartments and a light natural finish. Its minimalist design features thick shelves and a solid left side panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staggered, open compartments and the solid left side panel.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid vertical panel and the depth of the shelves, with compartments not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the open compartments and staggered shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a completely solid vertical panel with no openings.
